access_token.description: Yotpo API access token, sent as the X-Yotpo-Token header (Yotpo Core API v3's own documented auth scheme; generate via POST /core/v3/stores/{store_id}/access_tokens using your store ID and API secret, per https://core-api.yotpo.com/reference/yotpo-authentication — that token-exchange step is outside this connector's scope and must be performed once out-of-band). Never logged.

store_id.description: Yotpo store ID (app_key); substituted into every stream's store-scoped path.

product_id.description: Yotpo product ID (yotpo_id) scoping the product_variants stream's path (/products/{product_id}/variants); required only when reading that stream.

base_url.description: Yotpo API base URL override for tests or proxies.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
